title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays homage to Bhagat Singh, Sukhdev, and Rajguru on their ‘Martyrdom Day’
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays homage to Bhagat Singh, Sukhdev, and Rajguru on their ‘Martyrdom Day’

Bhagat Singh, Sukhdev, and Rajguru were icons who  inspired the youth to strive for the liberation of their motherland
Their sagas fill one’s heart with a profound sense of patriotism

Posted On:
23 MAR 2026 11:56AM by PIB Delhi

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah paid homage to Bhagat Singh, Sukhdev, and Rajguru on their ‘Martyrdom Day’.

In a post on X platform, Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah said that Bhagat Singh, Sukhdev, and Rajguru were icons of the Indian freedom movement who, through their thoughts and actions, inspired the youth to strive for the liberation of their motherland. He said that recalling the heroic sagas of these bravehearts—who willingly embraced the gallows for the sake of their motherland’s freedom—fills one’s heart with a profound sense of patriotism.

भगत सिंह, सुखदेव व राजगुरु भारतीय स्वाधीनता आंदोलन के ऐसे युगपुरुष हुए, जिन्होंने अपने विचार और व्यवहार, दोनों से मातृभूमि की आजादी के लिए युवाओं को प्रेरित किया। इन वीरों के पराक्रम की गूँज ने पूरी अंग्रेजी हुकूमत को भयभीत कर दिया। मातृभूमि की आजादी के लिए फाँसी के फंदे पर झूल…
pic.twitter.com/fZQyKBJU4U
— Amit Shah (@AmitShah)
March 23, 2026

*****
